title: Dutch gov't working on doctoral degree options for Universities of Applied Sciences
title_zh: 荷兰政府正在研究应用科学大学的博士学位选项
description: Students in the Netherlands will soon be able to obtain a doctoral degree at a university of applied sciences (HBO).
description_zh: 荷兰的学生很快就能在应用科学大学（HBO）获得博士学位。

title: Video: Man arrested for shooting at passerby from balcony of Heerlen apartment building
title_zh: 视频：男子因从海尔伦公寓楼阳台向路人开枪被捕
description: A man was firing gunshots from a balcony of a Heerlen apartment building late on Sunday afternoon.
description_zh: 周日下午晚些时候，一名男子从海尔伦一栋公寓楼的阳台上开枪射击。

title: Egg prices reach record high in Netherlands; Climbed nearly 40% in 5 years
title_zh: 荷兰鸡蛋价格创历史新高；五年内上涨近40%。
description: After a brief price drop in 2024, egg prices in the Netherlands have risen to a new record high, the Consumentenbond
description_zh: 荷兰消费者协会表示，2024年鸡蛋价格短暂下跌后，目前已创下历史新高。

title: Dutch football fans warned of ICE role in World Cup host cities
title_zh: 荷兰足球迷警告称，美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）可能在世界杯主办城市扮演重要角色
description: Human rights campaign group Amnesty International has warned that Dutch football fans face a “climate of fear” at this summer’s...
description_zh: 人权组织国际特赦组织警告称，荷兰足球迷在今年夏天将面临“恐惧氛围”……

title: Mini car sales in Amsterdam slide following parking permit halt
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹迷你车销量因停车许可证暂停而下滑。
description: Fewer people in Amsterdam are buying popular mini cars such as the Birò since the council stopped issuing city-wide parking...
description_zh: 自阿姆斯特丹市政府停止发放全市停车许可证以来，购买像Birò这样热门迷你车的阿姆斯特丹人越来越少了……

title: A chilly start to the week but warmer weather for Easter weekend
title_zh: 本周初天气寒冷，但复活节周末气温将回升。
description: After a stormy night and winds which brought down several trees, Monday will be a changeable day, with sunny spells...
description_zh: 经过一夜暴风雨和狂风吹倒多棵树木后，星期一将是多变的一天，时而阳光灿烂……

title: From tulips to tiny things: 11 great things to do in April
title_zh: 从郁金香到各种小玩意：四月必做的11件好事
description: It’s a mixed bag this month, with King’s Day as one of the highlights. Forecasters are on the fence about...
description_zh: 本月天气状况喜忧参半，国王节是其中的一大亮点。天气预报员们对……的预测尚无定论。

title: In some parts of NL, 30% voted by proxy in the local elections
title_zh: 在纽芬兰省的部分地区，地方选举中有30%的选民通过代理人投票。
description: One in 10 voters cast their ballot by proxy at the local elections earlier this month, and in some polling...
description_zh: 本月初的地方选举中，十分之一的选民通过代理人投票，一些民调显示……

title: Belgian man, 27, arrested after sudden group attack at Tilburg bachelor party
title_zh: 一名27岁的比利时男子在蒂尔堡的一场单身派对上突然袭击一群人后被捕。
description: A 27-year-old man from Belgium was arrested Saturday night after a violent group attack during a bachelor party in Tilburg’s city center left another 27-year-old man unconscious with a broken jaw a
description_zh: 周六晚，一名27岁的比利时男子在蒂尔堡市中心一场单身派对上参与暴力团伙袭击，导致另一名27岁男子下颚骨折、昏迷不醒，随后被捕。

title: 16% of Dutch don't have basic digital skills; Little improvement from 2 years ago
title_zh: 16%的荷兰人缺乏基本的数字技能；与两年前相比几乎没有改善。
description: Almost the same proportion of the Dutch population is digitally skilled as two years ago, Statistics Netherlands (CBS) reported based on a sample of approximately 6,000 Dutch people aged
description_zh: 荷兰中央统计局（CBS）基于对约6000名荷兰成年人的抽样调查报告称，荷兰人口中具备数字技能的比例与两年前几乎相同。

title: Man seriously wounded in shooting at highway gas station near Muiden
title_zh: 穆伊登附近高速公路加油站发生枪击事件，一名男子身受重伤。
description: A man was seriously injured in a shooting at a gas station along the A1 highway near Muiden on Sunday evening, the police
description_zh: 周日晚间，穆伊登附近A1高速公路旁一家加油站发生枪击事件，一名男子受重伤。

title: Dutch government allocates €22.9 million to improve LGBTI safety
title_zh: 荷兰政府拨款2290万欧元用于改善LGBTQI+人群的安全状况
description: The Dutch government will set aside 22.9 million euros in the coming years to improve safety for LGBTI people, as new research showing troubling attitudes among students has prompted concern among
description_zh: 荷兰政府将在未来几年拨款2290万欧元，用于改善LGBT群体的安全状况。此前一项新的研究显示，学生群体中存在令人担忧的态度，引发了各界的关注。

title: Noord-Brabant moves to ban the word ‘Holland’ in event branding
title_zh: 北布拉班特省拟禁止在活动品牌宣传中使用“荷兰”一词
description: Noord-Brabant is moving to eliminate the use of “Holland” in the names of sports and cultural events it supports, citing concerns over international branding and regional identity.
description_zh: 北布拉班特省正着手在其支持的体育和文化活动的名称中取消使用“荷兰”一词，理由是担心国际品牌形象和地区认同感受损。

title: Dutch program to repurpose seized criminal property for public use faces setbacks
title_zh: 荷兰一项旨在将缴获的犯罪财产重新用于公共用途的计划遭遇挫折
description: Efforts to turn confiscated criminal properties into community assets are faltering in multiple Dutch pilot projects, including a youth workshop in Schiedam that will shut down after the summer and
description_zh: 将没收的犯罪财产转化为社区资产的努力在荷兰的多个试点项目中进展缓慢，其中包括斯希丹的一个青年工作坊，该工作坊将在夏季结束后关闭。

title: Dutch doctors warn of rising obesity in pregnancy after French study flags health risks
title_zh: 法国一项研究指出孕期肥胖存在健康风险后，荷兰医生警告称孕期肥胖率正在上升。
description: French research warning that obesity in pregnancy is an underrecognized public health threat, combined with Dutch medical organizations acknowledging that the problem is increasing in the Netherlan
description_zh: 法国研究警告称，孕期肥胖是一个未被充分重视的公共卫生威胁，与此同时，荷兰医学组织也承认，这个问题在荷兰日益严重。

title: Dutch horse breeder under criminal probe over alleged illegal semen exports
title_zh: 一名荷兰马匹养殖户因涉嫌非法出口精液而接受刑事调查
description: A criminal investigation has been launched into a horse breeder in Opsterland over the alleged export of horse semen without proper certification, Dutch authorities said, alongside an inspection li
description_zh: 荷兰当局表示，已对奥普斯特兰的一名马匹养殖户展开刑事调查，指控其涉嫌在未获得适当认证的情况下出口马精液。同时，当局还启动了一项检查程序。

title: Video: Raid in Eindhoven leads to arrest of 21-year-old in Islamic State terrorism probe
title_zh: 视频：埃因霍温突袭行动逮捕一名涉嫌参与伊斯兰国恐怖主义调查的21岁男子
description: A 21-year-old man from Eindhoven was arrested in a terrorism investigation in which Dutch authorities are examining possible links to the Islamic State group (IS), police said.
description_zh: 警方称，一名来自埃因霍温的 21 岁男子因涉嫌恐怖主义被捕，荷兰当局正在调查他是否与伊斯兰国组织 (IS) 有关联。

title: Unusually high tree pollen levels hit Netherlands ahead of birch pollen peak
title_zh: 在桦树花粉高峰期到来之前，荷兰的树木花粉浓度异常偏高。
description: Health experts warned of unusually high pollen levels nationwide, as new data from the Leids Universitair Medisch Centrum and the Elkerliek ziekenhuis show a sharp rise in airborne tree pollen, wit
description_zh: 健康专家警告说，全国范围内的花粉水平异常高，莱兹大学医学中心和埃尔克利克齐肯休斯的新数据显示，空气中的树木花粉急剧增加，其中

title: Dutch universities see sharp drop in climate study enrollment
title_zh: 荷兰大学气候研究专业入学人数急剧下降
description: Student enrollment in climate and sustainability programs across the Netherlands is falling sharply, even as institutions warn the climate crisis remains unresolved and demand for expertise is stil
description_zh: 尽管各院校警告称气候危机仍未解决，且对相关专业知识的需求依然存在，但荷兰各地气候与可持续发展专业的学生入学人数却急剧下降。

title: Dutch teens attacked in separate Snapchat-linked violence cases across the Netherlands
title_zh: 荷兰各地发生多起与 Snapchat 相关的暴力袭击事件，多名荷兰青少年遭到袭击
description: Two separate cases of youth violence in the Netherlands linked to Snapchat and social media have led to assaults, threats, and ongoing fear for two families, while police across the country have re
description_zh: 荷兰两起与Snapchat和社交媒体相关的青少年暴力案件导致两起家庭遭受袭击、受到威胁，并持续感到恐惧，与此同时，全国各地的警方已重新展开调查。

title: Doctors warn children on Rotterdam asylum ship face risk of lasting developmental harm
title_zh: 医生警告称，鹿特丹难民船上的儿童面临永久性发育损害的风险。
description: Doctors and healthcare workers are warning that children living on the Silja asylum ship in Rotterdam face serious physical and mental health risks, with concerns that prolonged exposure to the con
description_zh: 医生和医护人员警告说，居住在鹿特丹“诗丽雅”号难民船上的儿童面临严重的身体和心理健康风险，他们担心长期暴露在……环境中会加剧这些问题。

title: Verstappen to take “weeks and months” to consider future as Red Bull struggles continue
title_zh: 维斯塔潘将花费“数周甚至数月”时间来考虑未来，因为红牛车队的困境仍在持续。
description: Max Verstappen is not enjoying his time in Formula 1 and will spend the coming “weeks and months” thinking about his future.
description_zh: 马克斯·维斯塔潘并不享受他在F1的时光，他将在接下来的“几周和几个月”里思考自己的未来。

title: Experts excited about possible discovery of musketeer d'Artagnan's remains in Maastricht
title_zh: 专家们对在马斯特里赫特可能发现火枪手达达尼昂的遗骸感到兴奋
description: French experts are reacting with cautious excitement afterskeletal remainsdi
description_zh: 法国专家在发现骨骼遗骸后，反应既谨慎又兴奋。

title: Fatal stabbing after nightlife brawl leaves one dead in Hoorn
title_zh: 霍恩夜店斗殴后发生致命刺伤事件，一人死亡
description: Police said Sunday that a stabbing in the Italian Zeedijk nightlife area in Hoorn on Saturday night, following a large brawl, left one person dead and two others injured.
description_zh: 警方周日表示，周六晚间在霍恩的意大利泽迪克夜生活区发生的一起持刀伤人事件，起因是一场大规模斗殴，造成一人死亡，两人受伤。

title: Dutch Royals’ "unusual" planned White House overnight stay draws public criticism
title_zh: 荷兰王室“不同寻常”的白宫过夜计划引发公众批评
description: King Willem-Alexander and Queen Máxima of the Netherlandswill visitthe Un
description_zh: 荷兰国王威廉-亚历山大和王后马克西玛将访问联合国

title: 19-year-old woman killed in  multi-vehicle crash in Zeeland crash; 3 injured
title_zh: 泽兰郡发生多车相撞事故，一名19岁女子死亡；另有3人受伤。
description: A 19-year-old woman from Aagtekerke was killed and three others were injured in a multi-vehicle crash in Zeeland on Saturday evening.
description_zh: 周六晚上，泽兰省发生一起多车相撞事故，造成一名来自阿格特克尔克的 19 岁女子死亡，另有三人受伤。

title: Americans turn out for “No Tyrants” protest in Amsterdam
title_zh: 美国民众在阿姆斯特丹参加“反对暴君”抗议活动
description: A few hundred protestors gathered on Amsterdam’s Museumplein in front of the US Consulate for the city’s third “No Tyrants”...
description_zh: 数百名抗议者聚集在阿姆斯特丹博物馆广场的美国领事馆前，参加该市第三次“反对暴君”活动……

title: Dutch health care spending falls by up to €1 billion as social costs rise
title_zh: 由于社会成本上升，荷兰医疗保健支出减少高达10亿欧元
description: The Dutch government is facing a mixed financial outlook as it prepares its spring budget update, with lower-than-expected health care spending offsetting significant cost increases in social secur
description_zh: 荷兰政府在准备春季预算更新时，面临着喜忧参半的财政前景：低于预期的医疗保健支出抵消了社会保障方面成本的大幅增长。

title: Clocks move ahead across Europe; Dispute over daylight saving continues
title_zh: 欧洲各地时钟拨快；夏令时之争仍在继续
description: Clocks across the Netherlands and other European countriesmoved forward by one hourea
description_zh: 荷兰和其他欧洲国家的时钟都向前拨快了一小时。

title: Police identify two Brazilian suspects in fatal stabbing of Dutch man in Bali
title_zh: 警方确认两名巴西籍嫌疑人涉嫌在巴厘岛刺死一名荷兰男子
description: Police on Bali have identified two foreign nationals as suspects in the fatalstabbing of a 49-
description_zh: 巴厘岛警方已确认两名外籍人士为一名49岁男子被刺身亡的嫌疑人。

title: Bonaire asks The Hague to intervene as Middle East unrest, freight costs drive up prices
title_zh: 博内尔岛请求海牙介入，中东动荡局势和货运成本推高物价。
description: The island government of Bonaire is urging the Dutch government to take immediate action as rising freight costs, driven by unrest in the Middle East and disruptions in shipping, threaten to push u
description_zh: 博内尔岛政府敦促荷兰政府立即采取行动，因为受中东动荡和航运中断影响，不断上涨的货运成本有可能使博内尔岛陷入困境。

title: Permitted large data centers in Amsterdam and Lelystad move ahead despite opposition
title_zh: 尽管遭到反对，阿姆斯特丹和莱利斯塔德获准建设的大型数据中心仍继续推进。
description: At least seven hyperscale data centers, including major facilities in Amsterdam and Lelystad, are moving forward with construction in the Netherlands despite recent political efforts to stop them,
description_zh: 尽管近期荷兰政界试图阻止，但至少有七个超大规模数据中心（包括位于阿姆斯特丹和莱利斯塔德的大型设施）仍在荷兰继续建设。

title: Senior buyers boost Dutch housing market by freeing up large family homes
title_zh: 老年购房者通过释放大型家庭住宅，提振了荷兰房地产市场。
description: A new Kadaster study shows older buyers are playing a key role in the Dutch housing market by purchasing a large share of new-build apartments and, crucially, triggering a chain reaction that frees
description_zh: 荷兰地籍局的一项新研究表明，老年购房者在荷兰住房市场中发挥着关键作用，他们购买了大量新建公寓，更重要的是，他们引发了一系列连锁反应，释放了更多潜在购房者的需求。

title: Prosecutors seek up to 17 years in appeal against alleged drug kingpin, 17 others
title_zh: 检方上诉，寻求对涉嫌毒枭及其他17人判处最高17年监禁。
description: The Dutch Public Prosecution Service (OM) is seeking prison sentences of up to 17 years and nine months on appeal for 18 defendants accused of belonging to a criminal organization led by alleged dr
description_zh: 荷兰公共检察署（OM）就18名被告的上诉寻求判处最高17年零9个月的监禁，这些被告被控隶属于一个由据称是医生的头目领导的犯罪组织。

title: Women in Netherlands take twice as many stress-related sick days as men
title_zh: 荷兰女性因压力而请病假的天数是男性的两倍。
description: Work absences due to stress in the Netherlands have risen sharply in recent years, with women—particularly those between ages 25 and 45—disproportionately affected, according to new data from occup
description_zh: 根据职业健康与安全研究机构（occupation Research）的最新数据，近年来荷兰因压力导致的缺勤率急剧上升，其中女性（尤其是25至45岁的女性）受到的影响尤为严重。

title: Don’t forget: clocks jump ahead one hour as summer time starts tonight
title_zh: 别忘了：今晚夏令时开始，时钟将拨快一小时。
description: In the night from Saturday to Sunday, the Netherlands switches to daylight saving time, moving clocks forward by one hour.
description_zh: 从周六到周日的夜间，荷兰将进入夏令时，时钟将拨快一小时。

title: Rival Iran war demonstrations in The Hague draw hundreds, police keep groups apart
title_zh: 海牙两场针锋相对的反伊战争示威活动吸引了数百人参加，警方将各派示威者隔开。
description: A few hundred people gathered Saturday afternoon on Malieveld to protest the war in Iran, while more than 100 counterdemonstrators gathered nearby on Bezuidenhoutseweg in support of military action
description_zh: 周六下午，数百人聚集在马利维尔德街，抗议伊朗战争；与此同时，一百多名反示威者聚集在附近的贝祖登豪特路，支持军事行动。

title: Child in stroller dies after car crash in Maastricht; Driver arrested
title_zh: 马斯特里赫特发生车祸，一名婴儿车内的儿童不幸身亡；肇事司机已被逮捕。
description: The child who was involved in atraffic accidentin Maastricht has died a
description_zh: 在马斯特里赫特发生的交通事故中受伤的儿童已经去世。

title: One in three 112 calls in Netherlands unintentional, many triggered by car systems
title_zh: 在荷兰，三分之一的112报警电话是无意的，其中许多是由汽车系统触发的。
description: Roughly one in three calls to the Dutch emergency number 112 is either placed unintentionally or involves no urgent need, according to
description_zh: 据统计，荷兰紧急求助电话112中，大约三分之一的来电是无意拨出的，或者并非出于紧急情况。

title: Struggles continue as Verstappen qualifies 11th for Japanese Grand Prix
title_zh: 维斯塔潘在日本大奖赛排位赛中仅获得第11名，苦苦挣扎的局面仍在继续。
description: Max Verstappen continued his difficult start to the 2026 Formula 1 season, qualifying 11th for the Japanese Grand Prix, while Kimi Antonelli secured pole position ahead of teammate George Russell,
description_zh: 马克斯·维斯塔潘在2026赛季F1的开局依然艰难，在日本大奖赛排位赛中仅获得第11名，而基米·安东内利则力压队友乔治·拉塞尔夺得杆位。

title: Video: Person injured after explosions spark house fire in Schiedam
title_zh: 视频：斯希丹爆炸引发房屋火灾，一人受伤
description: A person was injured after explosions triggered a house fire in Schiedam on Friday evening, with neighbors reporting hearing multiple explosions just before the fire.
description_zh: 周五晚间，斯希丹发生爆炸并引发房屋火灾，造成一人受伤。邻居们报告称，在火灾发生前听到了多次爆炸声。

title: Mona Keijzer formally ends BBB membership after earlier exit from parliamentary faction
title_zh: 莫娜·凯泽尔正式退出BBB党，此前她已退出议会党团。
description: Former Dutch Cabinet member Mona Keijzer formallyended her membershipin the Farmer–Citizen
description_zh: 荷兰前内阁成员莫娜·凯泽正式退出《农民-公民报》。

title: Changeable weather to bring rain and sunshine to the Netherlands over the weekend
title_zh: 荷兰周末天气多变，晴雨交替。
description: The weather across the Netherlands this weekend will be changeable, with periods of rain, cloud cover, and sunshine, though most of the daytime is expected to remain dry.
description_zh: 本周末荷兰各地天气多变，时而下雨，时而阴天，时而晴朗，但预计白天大部分时间天气晴朗。

title: Dutch experts warn outdated data hides scale of child domestic violence
title_zh: 荷兰专家警告称，过时的数据掩盖了儿童家庭暴力的严重程度。
description: Two urgent concerns are converging in the Netherlands: outdated national data on children exposed to domestic violence and growing warnings from experts that current support systems may not reflect
description_zh: 荷兰目前面临两大紧迫问题：一是关于遭受家庭暴力的儿童的全国性数据陈旧，二是专家们日益发出警告，认为现有的支持体系可能无法反映实际情况。

title: Suspect arrested after stabbing in Horn leaves one injured late Friday
title_zh: 周五晚间，霍恩镇发生一起持刀伤人事件，一人受伤，嫌疑人已被逮捕。
description: A man was injured in a stabbing in Horn late Friday, and a 35-year-old suspect from Haelen was arrested shortly afterward, police
description_zh: 周五晚间，霍恩镇发生一起持刀伤人事件，一名男子受伤。警方称，一名来自海伦镇的35岁嫌疑人随后被捕。

title: Major fire at Maastricht waste facility involving hazardous materials
title_zh: 马斯特里赫特废物处理厂发生重大火灾，涉及危险材料
description: A large fire broke out Saturday morning at a waste processing facility in Maastricht involving hazardous materials, L1
description_zh: 周六上午，马斯特里赫特一家废物处理厂发生大火，起火物为危险品，编号L1。

title: Two separate crashes in Glanerbrug and Maastricht leave one dead, two seriously injured
title_zh: 格拉纳布鲁格和马斯特里赫特分别发生两起车祸，造成一人死亡，两人重伤。
description: A man was killed in a crash in Glanerbrug, while a woman and a child were seriously injured in a separate incident in Maastricht on Friday evening, according to police.
description_zh: 据警方消息，周五晚上，格拉纳布鲁格发生一起车祸，一名男子丧生；马斯特里赫特发生另一起事故，一名女子和一名儿童受重伤。

title: Dutch schools join new textbook publisher to cut costs, improve sustainability
title_zh: 荷兰学校与新的教科书出版商合作，以降低成本并提高可持续性。
description: Nearly 1,400 schools in the Netherlands, representing more than 650,000 students,
description_zh: 荷兰近1400所学校，代表着超过65万名学生，

title: Itchy, sneezy summer? Oak processionary caterpillars make early Dutch arrival
title_zh: 夏天又痒又打喷嚏？橡树毛虫提前抵达荷兰
description: Oak processionary caterpillars have been seen earlier than ever this spring in the Netherlands.
description_zh: 今年春天，荷兰的橡树毛虫出现得比以往任何时候都早。

title: Senate shoots down law to monitor donations to mosques from abroad
title_zh: 参议院否决了旨在监控来自国外对清真寺捐款的法案
description: Mayors and the Public Prosecution Service will not gain extra authority to oversee foreign donations to community organizations like mosques and weekend schools.
description_zh: 市长和公共检察机关不会获得额外的权力来监督外国对清真寺和周末学校等社区组织的捐款。

title: Oranje beat Norway 2-1 in friendly at Johan Cruijff ArenA
title_zh: 橙衣军团在约翰·克鲁伊夫竞技场的友谊赛中以 2-1 击败挪威
description: Oranje was victorious in their friendly game against Norway on Friday. The Dutch national side won 2-1 in the Johan Cruijff ArenA thanks to goals from Virgil van Dijk and Tijjani Reijnders.
description_zh: 荷兰队周五在与挪威队的友谊赛中获胜。凭借范戴克和雷恩德斯的进球，荷兰国家队在约翰·克鲁伊夫竞技场以2-1的比分战胜了对手。

title: Contactless payments more popular than bank cards for first time
title_zh: 非接触式支付首次比银行卡更受欢迎
description: Contactless payments using a smartphone or smartwatch surpassed those made with a payment card for the first time in 2025.
description_zh: 2025年，使用智能手机或智能手表进行的非接触式支付首次超过了使用支付卡进行的支付。

title: Haaksbergen council agrees to conditions for asylum shelter after referendum
title_zh: 哈克斯伯根市议会在全民公投后同意庇护所的条件
description: Most members of Haaksbergen’s municipal council trust that the asylum referendum in the Twente municipality was carried out properly and have agreed on a list of criteria to guide the selection of
description_zh: 哈克斯贝亨市议会的大多数成员相信特温特市的庇护公投已妥善进行，并就一系列指导遴选的标准达成一致。

title: Over 100,000 illegal cigarettes found in Hague supermarket
title_zh: 海牙一家超市查获超过10万支非法香烟
description: A full-scale check by the The Hague Economic Intervention Team at a supermarket in Rustenburg‑Oostbroek uncovered and confiscated 102,800 illegal cigarettes.
description_zh: 海牙经济干预小组在鲁斯滕堡-奥斯特布鲁克的一家超市进行全面检查，查获并没收了 102,800 支非法香烟。

title: Dutch government reaches settlement with family of murdered Iranian activist
title_zh: 荷兰政府与遇害伊朗活动人士的家属达成和解。
description: The Dutch government has agreed on a settlement with the family of Ahmad Mola Nissi, an Iranian politician and activist killed in The Hague in 2017.
description_zh: 荷兰政府已与艾哈迈德·莫拉·尼西的家人达成和解协议。艾哈迈德·莫拉·尼西是一名伊朗政治家和活动家，于 2017 年在海牙遇害。

title: Online home store Fonq declared bankrupt, 100 jobs at risk
title_zh: 在线家居零售商Fonq宣布破产，100个工作岗位面临风险
description: A court has declared online home retailer Fonq bankrupt, according to the company’s trustees on Friday. They are now exploring whether parts of the business, including Naduvi, can be relaunched.
description_zh: 据该公司破产管理人周五透露，法院已宣布在线家居零售商Fonq破产。他们目前正在探讨包括Naduvi在内的部分业务是否可以重新启动。

title: Women in vulnerable situations structurally receiving less maternity care
title_zh: 处境脆弱的妇女在结构上获得的孕产妇保健服务较少
description: Maternity care quality is being compromised.
description_zh: 孕产妇护理质量正在下降。

title: Two men arrested for Rotterdam synagogue blast; Teen detained over Heemstede plot
title_zh: 两名男子因鹿特丹犹太教堂爆炸案被捕；一名青少年因涉嫌参与海姆斯泰德阴谋案被拘留。
description: Authorities have detained three men suspected of being involved in the explosion at a Rotterdam synagogue and in preparing an attack on a synagogue in Heemstede.
description_zh: 当局拘留了三名涉嫌参与鹿特丹犹太教堂爆炸案和策划袭击海姆斯泰德犹太教堂的男子。

title: Police arrest three men in connection with synagogue explosions
title_zh: 警方逮捕三名与犹太教堂爆炸案有关的男子
description: Dutch police have arrested three more suspects in connection with an explosion at a synagogue in Rotterdam and a planned...
description_zh: 荷兰警方逮捕了三名与鹿特丹一座犹太教堂爆炸案和一起计划中的袭击事件有关的嫌疑人……

title: Defense Min. defends €93,000 private jet trip to visit Mediterranean fregat
title_zh: 国防部长为花费9.3万欧元乘坐私人飞机访问地中海护卫舰辩护
description: Defense Minister Dilan Yeşilgöz said it was “absolutely necessary” for her to travel to Cyprus last week to visit the frigate Zr. Ms.
description_zh: 国防部长迪兰·耶希尔戈兹表示，她上周前往塞浦路斯视察“兹尔·米斯”号护卫舰是“绝对必要的”。

title: Rotterdam biker accused of groping 13 women should be jailed: Prosecutors
title_zh: 鹿特丹一名摩托车手被控猥亵13名女性，检察官认为他应该被判入狱。
description: The Public Prosecution Service has recommended a 2.5-year prison sentence for 32-year-old Nabil I. at the Rotterdam court.
description_zh: 公诉机关建议对 32 岁的纳比尔·I 在鹿特丹法院判处 2.5 年监禁。

title: Podcast: The You Do Not Need A Token For This Podcast Edition
title_zh: 播客：无需代币即可收听本期播客
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想支持 DutchNews 播客，并让我们的焦糖华夫饼和橙味甜甜圈库存充足吗？点击此处成为……

title: More DNA is needed to establish if skeleton is d’Artagnan
title_zh: 需要更多DNA样本才能确定这具骨骼是否属于达达尼昂。
description: An initial DNA test to try to establish if a skeleton found under a church in Maastricht is that of...
description_zh: 初步DNA检测旨在确定在马斯特里赫特一座教堂下发现的骸骨是否属于……

title: Dutch woman, 19, in ICE detention after trying to smuggle 76kg of ketamine into U.S.
title_zh: 一名19岁的荷兰女子因试图走私76公斤氯胺酮进入美国而被美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）拘留。
description: A 19-year-old Dutch woman is in an ICE detention center after she was caught trying to smuggle 76 kilograms of ketamine into the United States in October, RTV Oost
description_zh: 据荷兰广播电视台东部频道报道，一名19岁的荷兰女子因试图于10月份走私76公斤氯胺酮进入美国而被捕，目前被关押在美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）的拘留中心。

title: Dutch prosecution service staffer, partner held in drug investigation
title_zh: 荷兰检察机关工作人员及其伴侣因涉嫌毒品调查被捕
description: A 31-year-old employee of the Public Prosecution Service was arrested on Tuesday on suspicion of drug possession.
description_zh: 周二，一名31岁的检察机关雇员因涉嫌持有毒品被捕。

title: Five injured, one hospitalised after gas explosion at school
title_zh: 学校发生燃气爆炸，五人受伤，一人住院。
description: Five people have been injured after a cloud of gas ignited during a pancake event at a secondary school in...
description_zh: 在某中学举办煎饼活动中，一团气体被引燃，造成五人受伤……

title: EU parliament calls for ban on AI nudity-generating apps
title_zh: 欧盟议会呼吁禁止人工智能生成裸体图像的应用程序
description: The European parliament has called for a ban on AI apps that allow to create nude or sexually explicit audiovisual...
description_zh: 欧洲议会呼吁禁止使用人工智能应用程序来制作裸露或色情视听内容……

title: Online home furnishings group Fonq declared bankrupt
title_zh: 在线家居用品集团Fonq宣布破产
description: Dutch online furniture and home products retailer Fonq has been declared bankrupt. The group, which also owns the Naduvi platform,...
description_zh: 荷兰在线家具和家居用品零售商Fonq已被宣布破产。该集团旗下还拥有Naduvi平台……

title: Gas cylinder accident during pancake baking at Oosterhout school; 7 hurt, incl. 4 kids
title_zh: Oosterhout 学校烘烤煎饼时发生气瓶事故； 7 伤害，包括。 4个孩子
description: Seven people, including four children, were injured at a school in Oosterhout, Noord-Brabant, on Friday.
description_zh: 周五，北布拉班特省奥斯特豪特的一所学校发生事故，造成包括四名儿童在内的七人受伤。

title: Town may have to go back to the ballot box over possible fraud
title_zh: 由于可能存在舞弊行为，该镇可能需要重新进行投票。
description: The inhabitants of Gorinchem in Zuid-Holland may have to return to the ballot box due to possible election fraud, local...
description_zh: 由于可能存在选举舞弊，南荷兰省戈林赫姆的居民可能需要重新投票。

title: Suriname fails to make World Cup dreams come true
title_zh: 苏里南未能实现世界杯梦想
description: The former Dutch colony of Suriname has failed to win one of the last tickets to this summer’s World Cup...
description_zh: 前荷兰殖民地苏里南未能获得今夏世界杯的最后几个参赛名额之一……

title: Increasing rules putting Easter bonfires under pressure
title_zh: 日益严格的规定给复活节篝火带来压力
description: As per tradition, hundreds of Easter bonfires will be lit in the Nehtelrands on Easter Sunday, especially in the east of the country.
description_zh: 按照传统，复活节当天，荷兰北部地区，特别是该国东部地区，将点燃数百个复活节篝火。

title: Dutch investors' confidence plummeting over Iran war, Box 3 tax
title_zh: 受伊朗战争和第三类税收的影响，荷兰投资者信心暴跌。
description: Private investors in the Netherlands are currently either taking as few risks as possible or postponing investments on the stock market.
description_zh: 目前，荷兰的私人投资者要么尽可能减少风险，要么推迟对股市的投资。

title: 36,000 same-sex couples have tied the knot in 25 years in NL
title_zh: 过去25年里，纽芬兰省已有36000对同性伴侣喜结连理。
description: On April 1 it will be 25 years since the Netherlands became the first country in the world to legalise...
description_zh: 4月1日是荷兰成为世界上第一个将大麻合法化的国家25周年纪念日……

title: Banning supermarkets from selling cigarettes resulted in 23,000 fewer smokers: study
title_zh: 研究表明，禁止超市销售香烟使吸烟者减少了23000人。
description: Due to the ban on selling tobacco in supermarkets, mini-supermarkets, and night shops as of 1 July 2024, the number of smokers decreased by an estimated 23,000 by the end of that year, ac
description_zh: 由于自2024年7月1日起禁止在超市、小型超市和夜间商店销售烟草，到当年年底，吸烟者人数估计减少了23000人。

title: Brussels agrees new handling fee for parcels from outside the EU
title_zh: 布鲁塞尔同意对来自欧盟以外的包裹收取新的处理费
description: The European Union has agreed to introduce a new handling fee for small parcels from outside the bloc, aimed primarily...
description_zh: 欧盟已同意对来自欧盟以外的小包裹征收新的处理费，主要目的是……

title: Dutch discounter Action plans to open stores in the US
title_zh: 荷兰折扣零售商Action计划在美国开设门店。
description: Dutch discount chain Action is planning to expand into the United States, with the first store expected to open by...
description_zh: 荷兰折扣连锁店 Action 计划进军美国市场，首家门店预计将于……开业。
